what BBQs are like when you're 30, single and male

Our 8-year-old son woke up early this morning to put together stockings for me and his mom...which were plastic bags full of what you see here.

My young niece and I send each other funny cards in the mail sometimes. Her latest one really cut me deep.

My sister is a very dark person

Me and my sisters..ever notice how sorority girls pose exactly like meerkats in pictures?
